Ollama releases: v0.30.4
items.description:
## What's Changed
* llama.cpp version update by @dhiltgen in https://github.com/ollama/ollama/pull/16463
* Kill llama-server during Windows cleanup by @dhiltgen in https://github.com/ollama/ollama/pull/16458


## Known Issues
* gemma4:12b crash with floating point exception

**Full Changelog

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/ollama/ollama/compare/v0.30.2...v0.30.3
